channel.title: OnOptions
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from OnOptions, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Opinion: Younger Generations' AI Dependence Prompts Call for a Digital Harm Tax
item.description: A writer argues that phone bans and litigation have not adequately addressed the harms of social media and proposes a new tax to account for digital harm.

item.title: Dozens of Employees Have Left Elon Musk's xAI Amid Merger and Expansion Activity
item.description: Staff departures at xAI have continued despite the company's merger with SpaceX, a reported $60 billion option to acquire Cursor, and plans for a public offering.

item.title: U.S.-Canada Trade Dispute Costs American Whiskey Brands $143 Million in Losses
item.description: Retaliatory measures stemming from trade tensions between the U.S. and Canada have dealt a major financial blow to American whiskey producers that previously relied heavily on Canadian buyers.

item.title: U.S. Soldier Charged with Using Classified Intelligence in $400,000 Polymarket Bet
item.description: A special forces soldier involved in a military operation targeting Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro has been charged with leveraging classified information in a large prediction market wager.

item.title: 2026 NFL Draft's Top Pick Fernando Mendoza Draws Attention for Emotional Intelligence
item.description: Fernando Mendoza, selected first overall in the 2026 NFL Draft, has been recognized for qualities beyond physical talent, with analysts pointing to his emotional maturity as a key asset.
